trigger: Query run starts with limit greater than max rows
message_template: limit {limit} cannot be greater than max_rows {max_rows}

trigger: Dataset id does not exist in config
message_template: dataset {dataset_id} is not declared in cliSpec.datasets
recommended_action: Use dataset list and check dataset id spelling

trigger: Expected field is absent in source data
recommended_action: Fix source data or update declared fields

trigger: Observed type differs from declared type
recommended_action: Align source type coercion or adjust declared type

trigger: No files found for partitioned dataset
message_template: no files matched prefix {prefix} and suffix {suffix}
recommended_action: Verify path prefix suffix and partition filters

trigger: Native engine selected but required codec missing
message_template: native validation requires codec for compression {compression}
recommended_action: Install codec dependency or switch to duckdb engine
Reduce data scope with parameters or increase max rows
